channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Anthony Davis is set for his Mavs debut and understands the ire of fans who lost Luka Doncic
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis expects to make his debut for the Dallas Mavericks in their first home game since the seismic trade that sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How San Jose Sharks are adapting since trading Granlund, Ceci to Dallas Stars
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks face ex-teammates Mikael Granlund and Cody Ceci on Saturday when they face the Dallas Stars at SAP Center
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Pawnbrokers raided in connection with Joe Burrow burglary denied bail days before the Super Bowl
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two owners of a New York City pawnshop that was raided by the FBI in connection with an investigation into a burglary at the home of Cincinnati Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow were denied bail Friday, with a federal judge saying it would be “ironic” to release the men just two days
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tiger Woods to play at Torrey Pines, his first PGA Tour event since July
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Tiger Woods committed Friday to playing the Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines, returning to one of his favorite venues for his first PGA Tour start since the British Open last July.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Public visitation scheduled for Virginia Halas McCaskey
item.description: The public will have an opportunity to pay their respects and say goodbye to Virginia Halas McCaskey, the longtime owner and matriarch of the Chicago Bears, who passed away Thursday at the age of 102.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Spring training preview: Dodgers are favored to be MLB's first repeat champion in a quarter-century
item.description: Miguel Rojas gladly gave up his No. 11 to Roki Sasaki and went back to 72, his jersey as a Los Angeles Dodgers rookie in 2014. “I'm not asking for anything. I have everything that I want in life,” the 35-year-old infielder said. "All I ask for him is trying to get us another championship.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Settlement creates $5 million fund for NWSL players after abuse scandal
item.description: The National Women's Soccer League will establish a $5 million fund for players as part of a settlement that stemmed from allegations of emotional and sexual misconduct that rocked the league in 2021. Attorneys general from Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Travis Kelce fined for unsportsmanlike conduct in AFC title game
item.description: While there was no flag thrown on the play, Kelce got hit with an $11,255 fine for unsportsmanlike conduct after a one-yard Mahomes rushing touchdown
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: President Trump welcomes Florida Panthers to the White House
item.description: The Florida Panthers were the first professional championship team to be celebrated at the White House under the new Trump administration on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Celtics rally from 26-point deficit to top 76ers 118-110
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored 13 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied from a 26-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 118-110 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DeWanna Bonner will join the Indiana Fever, AP source says
item.description: DeWanna Bonner is headed to Indiana to join Caitlin Clark and the Fever, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Americans to spend 22% more on the Super Bowl this year: Survey
item.description: The LendingTree 2025 Super Bowl Spending Report survey covers everything from food and fan merch to sports betting.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Aggies go cold in battle for first place
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the biggest game of the season, the Utah State basketball team had one of its worst offensive performances of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Reinhart scores 30th, Maurice wins 900th as Panthers top Blackhawks after Slaggert's 7-second goal
item.description: Sam Reinhart got his 30th goal of the season and added two assists, Matthew Tkachuk scored for the third time in the last four games and the Florida Panthers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz end 8-game skid with 113-99 win over Magic
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The losing streak is finally over. Collin Sexton scored 22 points and John Collins added 19 to help the Utah Jazz snap an eight-game losing streak with a 113-99 victory over the Orlando Magic on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU hits 14 three-pointers in fourth straight victory
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders made six of BYU's 14 3-pointers and scored 22 points to lead the Cougars to an 81-75 victory over UCF on Saturday for its fourth straight win. Mawot Mag added a season-high 19 points and matched a career-best with five assists for BYU (15-6, 6-4 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes fall to Oklahoma State, 81-72
item.description: STILLWATER, Okla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes are finding life on the road in the Big 12 tough in their first season in the conference.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
